text: The first space is quiet, expectant—a room prepared for discussion, an audience yet to come. I feel a hush in the emptiness, the possibility of collective thought awaiting manifestation. The second space is bright, stimulating, awash in ideas and language. I am surrounded by an energy of curiosity and creation, each word and diagram inviting me to ponder the connection between humans and knowledge. Here, I feel engaged and open, drawn into a conversation that transcends the present moment.
